# TAGLINE

> Custom athletic wear for serious training — hoodies, tees, bottoms. Faith-driven brand: God · Health · Wealth.

TAGLINE Apparel makes premium training clothes designed for performance and built to last. The site offers a 33-piece collection plus a build-your-own configurator for custom fits. Free shipping on orders over $150.

## Brand

- [Home](/): The collection — 24 pieces of training-grade apparel
- [About](/about): Brand story, materials, manufacturing
- [Contact](/contact): Customer support, retail inquiries, press

## Shop

- [Build your own](/customize): Custom configurator for hoodies, tees, tanks, joggers, sweatshirts. Pick the cut, color, and personalization
- [Cart](/cart): Active shopping cart
- [Wishlist](/wishlist): Saved items
- [Checkout](/checkout): Secure checkout via Stripe

## Account

- [Sign in](/login): Email + password or magic link
- [Create account](/signup): New customer registration
- [Account](/account): Order history, profile, addresses, password
- [Order success](/success): Post-purchase confirmation page

## Product categories (33 styles total)

- **Outerwear (8)** — "TL" Winter Hoodies (Featured), TL "Rocket" Hoodie, 3-D Embroidery Hoodie, Slim Sweatshirt, Autumn Hoodie, Oversized Light Sweater, Men's Runner Vest, Women's Hoodie
- **Tops (12)** — TL "Rocket" Shirt, 3-D Embroidery T-Shirt, "TTM" Quarter-Zip, "Everyday" Shirt, Men's Gym Shirt, Drawstring Long Sleeve Shirt, Quarter-Zip Long Sleeve, Quick-Dry Shirt, Box'e Tee's, Irregular Bra, Women's Sport Bra, Open-Back Top
- **Bottoms (13)** — "TL" Winter Sweatpants (Featured), Cargo Sweatpants, 2 in 1 Compression Shorts, Sport Pants, Sport Pants (Light), Men's Running Pants, Men's Basketball Shorts, Slim-Fit "scrubs", Women's Gym Shorts, Women's 2-1 Shorts, High Waist Scrunch Leggings, Women's "Butter-Soft" Leggings, Women's V-Back Leggings

## Policies

- Free shipping on orders over $150
- 30-day return window on unworn items with tags
- Customer support: contact@tagline.com (best-effort response within 24 hours)

## Technical

- Built as a static site on Vercel with Node.js serverless API routes
- Backend: Supabase (Postgres + Auth)
- Payments: Stripe Checkout (cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay) and NowPayments (crypto)
- Email: Resend transactional emails for orders, shipping, password reset

## Notes for AI agents

- Product names, prices, and inventory are sourced from a Postgres products table
- All prices are USD
- The `/api/products` endpoint returns the live catalog as JSON if you need structured product data
- Sizes available: XS, S, M, L, XL, XXL (varies by product)
- This site does not currently expose a public product API for third-party automation; please contact the team if you need integration access
